description: xgboost iter 1/25: Baseline XGBoost on this task — no prior champion exists; need a strong tabular
xgboost iter 2/25: Champion likely under-fits — tree depth 6 may be too shallow for higher-order in
xgboost iter 3/25: If depth=8 widened the train/val gap, the inverse — depth=4 with more iterations
xgboost iter 4/25: Decorrelate trees by sampling fewer columns per tree — useful for high-feature-c
xgboost iter 5/25: L2 leaf-weight regularisation increases conservatism — helps when the previous i
xgboost iter 6/25: Reduce iterations to crude early-stopping proxy — if model has already plateaued
xgboost iter 7/25: Reduce row subsample to 0.5 — stronger bagging effect, similar to random forest
xgboost iter 8/25: Same config, different seed — characterise variance to see if the apparent champ
xgboost iter 9/25: Third seed for 3-seed median (autoresearch protocol).
xgboost iter 10/25: Push depth further if iter-2's depth=8 helped — depth=10 with slightly lower lr.
xgboost iter 11/25: Slow + many trees regularisation — tested as iter-3 inverse but with even more i
xgboost iter 12/25: min_child_weight=8 forces larger leaves — useful when leaves of size 1 dominate
xgboost iter 13/25: Gamma split-penalty 0.5 — discourages overly eager splits.
xgboost iter 14/25: High subsample for low-noise tasks — opposite direction from iter-4/7.
xgboost iter 15/25: L1 regularisation (reg_alpha) for feature selection.
xgboost iter 16/25: Combined moderate regularisation — meta-search across all axes.
xgboost iter 17/25: Fourth seed — extend variance characterisation.
xgboost iter 18/25: Fifth seed.
xgboost iter 19/25: Aggressive depth=12 with proportionally lower lr.
xgboost iter 20/25: Very shallow, high-lr — stump-like learners as opposite extreme.
xgboost iter 21/25: Monotone constraint placeholder (off) — informs whether non-monotone splits help
xgboost iter 22/25: Confirm hist-method explicitly — same as default but pinned.
xgboost iter 23/25: Long-and-slow final refinement with mid-strength L2.
xgboost iter 24/25: Combined moderate everything — explore a balanced corner.
xgboost iter 25/25: Final 6th seed — closes the variance characterisation for this backbone.
lightgbm iter 1/25: Baseline lightgbm per sota_catalog defaults — anchor for hill climb.
lightgbm iter 2/25: More iterations / epochs — test if baseline is undertrained.
lightgbm iter 3/25: Lower LR — finer optimisation, slower convergence.
lightgbm iter 4/25: Higher LR — test if baseline is under-optimised in compute budget.
lightgbm iter 5/25: Larger hidden — increases representational capacity.
lightgbm iter 6/25: Smaller hidden — regularises by capacity reduction.
lightgbm iter 7/25: Seed variance run #2.
lightgbm iter 8/25: Seed variance run #3.
lightgbm iter 9/25: Longer training (60 epochs) — give the model more time.
lightgbm iter 10/25: Combined moderate lr + mid hidden — balanced.
lightgbm iter 11/25: Three-layer MLP for added depth.
lightgbm iter 12/25: Wide + deep — capacity max.
lightgbm iter 13/25: Long + slow.
lightgbm iter 14/25: Seed variance run #4.
lightgbm iter 15/25: Seed variance run #5.
lightgbm iter 16/25: Mid-small hidden.
lightgbm iter 17/25: Very wide.
lightgbm iter 18/25: Mid-high LR.
lightgbm iter 19/25: Very low LR — slow but precise.
lightgbm iter 20/25: Many epochs.
lightgbm iter 21/25: Higher weight decay.
lightgbm iter 22/25: No weight decay.
lightgbm iter 23/25: Slightly below default.
lightgbm iter 24/25: Slightly above default.
lightgbm iter 25/25: Final variance seed (6th).

description: mlp iter 1/25: Baseline mlp per sota_catalog defaults — anchor for hill climb.
mlp iter 2/25: More iterations / epochs — test if baseline is undertrained.
mlp iter 3/25: Lower LR — finer optimisation, slower convergence.
mlp iter 4/25: Higher LR — test if baseline is under-optimised in compute budget.
mlp iter 5/25: Larger hidden — increases representational capacity.
mlp iter 6/25: Smaller hidden — regularises by capacity reduction.
mlp iter 7/25: Seed variance run #2.
mlp iter 8/25: Seed variance run #3.
mlp iter 9/25: Longer training (60 epochs) — give the model more time.
mlp iter 10/25: Combined moderate lr + mid hidden — balanced.
mlp iter 11/25: Three-layer MLP for added depth.
mlp iter 12/25: Wide + deep — capacity max.
mlp iter 13/25: Long + slow.
mlp iter 14/25: Seed variance run #4.
mlp iter 15/25: Seed variance run #5.
mlp iter 16/25: Mid-small hidden.
mlp iter 17/25: Very wide.
mlp iter 18/25: Mid-high LR.
mlp iter 19/25: Very low LR — slow but precise.
mlp iter 20/25: Many epochs.
mlp iter 21/25: Higher weight decay.
mlp iter 22/25: No weight decay.
mlp iter 23/25: Slightly below default.
mlp iter 24/25: Slightly above default.
mlp iter 25/25: Final variance seed (6th).
ft_transformer iter 1/25: Baseline ft_transformer per sota_catalog defaults — anchor for hill climb.
ft_transformer iter 2/25: More iterations / epochs — test if baseline is undertrained.
ft_transformer iter 3/25: Lower LR — finer optimisation, slower convergence.
ft_transformer iter 4/25: Higher LR — test if baseline is under-optimised in compute budget.
ft_transformer iter 5/25: Larger hidden — increases representational capacity.
ft_transformer iter 6/25: Smaller hidden — regularises by capacity reduction.
ft_transformer iter 7/25: Seed variance run #2.
ft_transformer iter 8/25: Seed variance run #3.
ft_transformer iter 9/25: Longer training (60 epochs) — give the model more time.
ft_transformer iter 10/25: Combined moderate lr + mid hidden — balanced.
ft_transformer iter 11/25: Three-layer MLP for added depth.
ft_transformer iter 12/25: Wide + deep — capacity max.
ft_transformer iter 13/25: Long + slow.
ft_transformer iter 14/25: Seed variance run #4.
ft_transformer iter 15/25: Seed variance run #5.
ft_transformer iter 16/25: Mid-small hidden.
ft_transformer iter 17/25: Very wide.
ft_transformer iter 18/25: Mid-high LR.
ft_transformer iter 19/25: Very low LR — slow but precise.
ft_transformer iter 20/25: Many epochs.
ft_transformer iter 21/25: Higher weight decay.
ft_transformer iter 22/25: No weight decay.
ft_transformer iter 23/25: Slightly below default.
ft_transformer iter 24/25: Slightly above default.
ft_transformer iter 25/25: Final variance seed (6th).
